title: Weekly Insights Review
summary:
Read here everything you need to know


Imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source
China's coal import data for May by origin has been released and shows imports from Indonesia have remained the primary source of imports and Russia the second largest source of imports. Read More

Yet, we feel that markets might once again be missing the forest for the trees
Last week featured more volatility, with the world's leading indices anchoring at bear-market levels in anticipation of new sharp rate hikes by the Fed. Read More

Recession fears gripped commodity markets, with crude oil and metals suffering sharp losses
A stronger USD also weighed on investor sentiment.

children.title: India's refiners have been riding the waves of soaring refining margins over the past months but the tides could be turning soon
section_path: India's refiners have been riding the waves of soaring refining margins over the past months but the tides could be turning soon
children.section_path_text: India's refiners have been riding the waves of soaring refining margins over the past months but the tides could be turning soon
children.summary: Ιndia's refiners have been enjoying windfall profits from sky-high domestic and export margins in recent months, further sweetened by access to discounted Russian crude.
